name: idea2self-ecosystem
description: Idea2Self — Von vager Idee zu messbarem nächsten Schritt. Sammlung von Claude-Code-Plugins rund um Ideenentwicklung, Validierung und Umsetzung.

plugins.name: idea2self
plugins.description: Idea2Self — Vom Impuls zum Action-Plan in 12 Stunden. Workshop-Skills fuer Founder und Side-Project-Macher: Idee schaerfen, Problem formulieren, Zielgruppe verstehen, Markt scannen, Interviews vorbereiten, Experiment designen, Loesungen erfinden, Loesung skizzieren, naechste Schritte planen, Erkenntnisse einarbeiten.

plugins.name: startup-business-analyst
plugins.description: Comprehensive startup business analysis with market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), financial modeling, team planning, and strategic research for early-stage companies

plugins.name: content-marketing
plugins.description: Content marketing strategy, web research, and information synthesis for marketing operations

plugins.name: social-publishing
plugins.description: Schedule and publish social media posts across 13 platforms (X, LinkedIn Profile + Page, Instagram Business + Standalone, Facebook Pages, TikTok, Discord, Telegram, YouTube, Reddit, WordPress, Pinterest) via SocialClaw — one workspace API key covers everything

plugins.name: product-innovation
plugins.description: Product innovation and validation frameworks including Lean Startup methodology, Google Ventures Design Sprint, and Don Norman's design principles
